plot.description: Hi-C plot object from plotHicSquare or plotHicTriangle on which to annotate pixels

data.description: A string specifying the BEDPE file path, a dataframe in BEDPE format specifying pixel positions, or a InteractionSet GInteractions object specifying pixel positions

type.description: Character value specifying type of annotation

half.description: Character value specifying which half of hic plots to annotate

shift.description: Numeric specifying the number of pixels on either end of main pixel in a box or circle

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters

quiet.description: A logical indicating whether or not to print messages
